content.full_text:
March 25, 1992

Sandra Taylor  
Fair Political Practices Commission  
428 "J" Street  
Suite 700  
Sacramento, California 95814  

Re: Name of Ballot Measure Committee

Dear Sandra:

This will confirm our telephone conversations of March 17 and 18, 1992 regarding the appropriate name for a campaign committee supporting a local ballot measure. You indicated that it was permissible for such a campaign committee to include in its name the phrase "Yes On Charter Amendment F" and thereby comply with the requirements of Government Code §84107.

Thank you for your cooperation in this matter. If you have any additional input on this matter, please do not hesitate to contact Brad Seiling or myself at (310) 312-4000.

Very truly yours,

[signature]  
Philip R. Recht  
Manatt, Phelps, Phillips & Kantor
